Documentation for this format

name: EHDSServiceRequestLaboratoryObligations
title: Service request laboratory specific obligations
description: Obligations for the logical model of service request in the scope of laboratory use case

element.short: Service request model
element.definition: The model covers details about a requested service or services. One order may include several requests.

element.short: Basic metadata for this information
element.definition: Basic metadata for this information

extension.valueMarkdown: EHR systems SHALL provide information about the subject of care (patient).

element.short: Patient/subject information
element.definition: Patient/subject information

extension.valueMarkdown: A business identifier SHALL be populated, if known.

element.short: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).
element.definition: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

extension.valueMarkdown: Service request authorship SHALL be present.

element.short: Author(s) responsible for the provided information.
element.definition: Author(s) responsible for the provided information. The exact role of the responsible author varies across use cases and is specific to individual models.

extension.valueMarkdown: Issue date SHALL be present.

element.short: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing
element.definition: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL be able to populate status of the service request.

element.short: Status of the resource or document
element.definition: Status of the resource or document

element.short: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.
element.definition: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

element.short: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
element.definition: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL populate service request note, if known.

element.short: Textual description of the requested service
element.definition: Textual description of the requested service

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL populate type of requested service

element.short: A code and name that identifies a particular service (i.e., procedure, diagnostic investigation, or panel of investigations) that have been requested.
element.definition: A code and name that identifies a particular service (i.e., procedure, diagnostic investigation, or panel of investigations) that have been requested.

extension.valueMarkdown: Quantity of requested service SHALL be populated

element.short: Amount of requested services of the same type
element.definition: Amount of requested services of the same type

element.short: Anatomic location and laterality where the procedure should be performed. This is the target site.
element.definition: Anatomic location and laterality where the procedure should be performed. This is the target site.

extension.valueMarkdown: Reason for service request SHALL be populated

element.short: Reason why this service is being requested.
element.definition: Reason why this service is being requested.

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL be able to populate service request priority, if known.

element.short: Indicates how quickly the request should be addressed with respect to other requests.
element.definition: Indicates how quickly the request should be addressed with respect to other requests.

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL populate supporting information for the servce request, e.g. Medication, Procedure, Observation, etc., if known.

element.short: Health conditions relevant for the results interpretation, e.g. fasting status, sex for clinical use, etc.
element.definition: Health conditions relevant for the results interpretation, e.g. fasting status, sex for clinical use, etc.

extension.valueMarkdown: SHALL populate related  specimen, if known.

element.short: Specimens to be used by the laboratory procedure
element.definition: Specimens to be used by the laboratory procedure

element.short: The encounter that provides additional information about the healthcare context in which this request is made.
element.definition: The encounter that provides additional information about the healthcare context in which this request is made.

element.short: Expected time of the service
element.definition: Expected time of the service

element.short: Patient or consumer-oriented instructions
element.definition: Patient or consumer-oriented instructions

extension.valueMarkdown: EHR systems SHALL provide information about the subject of care (patient).
A business identifier SHALL be populated, if known.
Service request authorship SHALL be present.
Issue date SHALL be present.
SHALL be able to populate status of the service request.
SHALL populate service request note, if known.
SHALL populate type of requested service
Quantity of requested service SHALL be populated
Reason for service request SHALL be populated
SHALL be able to populate service request priority, if known.
SHALL populate supporting information for the servce request, e.g. Medication, Procedure, Observation, etc., if known.
SHALL populate related  specimen, if known.
